triples.object: A work permit or work visa is the permission to take a job within a foreign country. The foreign country where someone seeks to obtain a work permit for is also known as the "country of work", as opposed to the "country of origin" where someone holds citizenship or nationality . triples.subject: Residence permit
triples.object:
A residence permit [ 1 ] [ 2 ] [ 3 ] (less commonly residency permit ) is a document or card required in some regions, allowing a foreign national to reside in a country for a fixed or indefinite length of time.
These may be permits for temporary residency, or permanent residency . The exact rules v
